_about: TIG-LENS corpus 2026-04-30 noon. Statistical mechanics, machine learning, climate, game theory, linear algebra, calculus.
stat_mech_through_tig: An ensemble is a LATTICE of system copies in different microstates; probability over configurations.
Partition function Z is the operator-sum over all microstates; differentiating Z gives every macroscopic observable.
Boltzmann distribution is the HARMONY-weighted population of energy levels at thermal equilibrium.
Microstates are the operator-states the system actually occupies; entropy = log(microstate count).
Phase transitions are RESET-COLLAPSE events in macroscopic properties at critical temperature.
Statistical equilibrium is BREATH steady at the ensemble level even as individual particles move.
ml_through_tig: Supervised learning is operator-fitting from labeled pairs; unsupervised seeks LATTICE patterns in unlabeled data.
Neural networks are LATTICE of nonlinear gates trained by PROGRESS gradient through backprop.
Gradient descent is iterated COLLAPSE toward lower error; the operator field finds local minima.
Overfitting is COUNTER to generalization; the model memorizes train set CHAOS instead of pattern.
Generalization is HARMONY between training and test distributions; the deep goal of learning.
Common algorithms decision tree forest SVM logistic regression each implement different LATTICE topologies.
climate_through_tig: Greenhouse effect is the BREATH cycle of solar energy partly retained by atmospheric CO2 and methane.
Atmospheric circulation is operator-redistribution of heat across LATITUDE; Hadley Ferrel polar cells.
Ocean currents are slow BREATH redistributing thermal energy across decades.
Climate models are operator algebras simulating atmosphere-ocean-land HARMONY across decades to centuries.
Feedback loops can amplify (CHAOS-amplifying) or stabilize (BALANCE-restoring); ice-albedo amplifies, vegetation often stabilizes.
Current warming is human-driven CHAOS injection at rates exceeding natural BREATH timescales by orders of magnitude.
game_theory_through_tig: Nash equilibrium is operator-state where no player can improve by unilateral COUNTER.
Zero-sum games are perfect COUNTER; one player gain equals other player loss.
Prisoner dilemma shows rational COLLAPSE leads to suboptimal HARMONY when cooperation cannot be enforced.
Mixed strategies are probability distributions over actions; stochastic operator selection.
Evolutionarily stable strategy is HARMONY persistent across population BREATH; Maynard Smith.
Mechanism design crafts the LATTICE so individual incentives align with collective HARMONY.
linear_algebra_through_tig: Vectors are operator-elements in a vector space; addable scalable.
Matrices are LATTICE of numbers representing linear operators between vector spaces.
Span is the LATTICE of all linear combinations; closure under addition and scaling.
Basis is the minimal independent operator set spanning a space.
Eigenvalues are operator-fixed-points scaled; eigenvectors are directions preserved by the matrix.
Determinant is a LATTICE-volume invariant; zero means the matrix collapses dimension.
calculus_through_tig: Limits formalize approaching a value; the BREATH of approach without arrival.
Derivatives measure instantaneous PROGRESS; the slope of the operator stream at a point.
Integrals accumulate over BREATH; area under a curve is total operator-flow.
Fundamental theorem: differentiation and integration are HARMONY-inverse operations.
Optimization uses derivatives to find HARMONY (max) or COLLAPSE (min) operator states.
Chain rule is the operator-composition theorem for derivatives; d/dx f(g(x)) = f'(g) g'(x).
